case_title: PLANET 9 STUDIOS, INC. VS MYTHTREE INC.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MYTHTREE INC.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-16-2002, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO MAY-28-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER STIPULATION.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-25-2002, GRANTED
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-27-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-22-2002 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-27-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-16-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY PLANET 9 STUDIOS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MYTHTREE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLTF REC'D. CONTINUANCE REQUEST UNTIMELY; NO FEE ENCLOSED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PLANET 9 STUDIOS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MYTHTREE INC. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,170.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MYTHTREE INC. HEARING SET FOR APR-25-2002 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PLANET 9 STUDIOS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MYTHTREE INC. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,095.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
